settings.title: Fifteen Years of Keeping Local Books in Order
settings.excerpt: We are celebrating fifteen years by thanking the first client who is still with us today.
settings.body:
Ledgerworks opened fifteen years ago above a hardware shop on the high street. Our very first client was the shop downstairs, and remarkably they are still on our books today.

A lot of accounting has gone digital since then, and we have changed with it. What has stayed the same is that most of our clients still come from someone recommending us to a neighbour.

To mark the anniversary we are sponsoring this year's local business awards. It feels right to give something back to the community that built this firm one introduction at a time.
